name: Kimi K3
description: Kimi K3 is Moonshot AI's next-generation multimodal model. Pre-release reporting places it between 2 and 3 trillion total parameters with a 1M-token context window; final architecture details, API pricing, and benchmarks are awaiting Moonshot AI's release materials.

details.name: availability_note
details.value: Release-day catalog entry staged for Moonshot AI. The provider route remains inactive until the final API model ID and pricing are published; the weights URL follows Moonshot AI's recent Hugging Face naming convention.
